title: Shri Chintpurni Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Chintpurni Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Chintpurni.
description:
Jai Chintpurni Mata, Chinta haro Mata.
Jeevan mein sukh de do, kasht haro Mata॥
॥ Om Jai Chintpurni Mata ॥

Uncha parvat tera, jhande jhool rahe.
Karen aarti saare, man mein phool rahe॥
॥ Om Jai Chintpurni Mata ॥

Sati ke shubh charno par, mandir hai bhari.
Chhinn mastika kehte, saare sansari॥
॥ Om Jai Chintpurni Mata ॥

Maidas ek brahmin, swapan mein daras diye.
Pooja pindi dhyan kar, anand bhav kiye॥
॥ Om Jai Chintpurni Mata ॥

Bargad ped hai dar par, sukh bhandar bhare.
Ghante ghan ghan baje, jai jai kar karen॥
॥ Om Jai Chintpurni Mata ॥

Kanya gaati dar pe, madhur swaron mein jab.
Jinko sun ke, chinta, man ki hate Maa sab॥
॥ Om Jai Chintpurni Mata ॥

Paan supari dhwaja nariyal, chhatra chunni sang mein.
Chandan itra gulab jal, bhent chadhe ang mein॥
॥ Om Jai Chintpurni Mata ॥

Chintit jeevan ki Maa, tum ho rakh wali.
Sevak aarti karta, kar mein liye thali॥
॥ Om Jai Chintpurni Mata ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Maa Chintpurni's Aarti?
faq.a1: Maa Chintpurni is the 'Reliever of all worries'. Performing her Aarti helps in alleviating mental stress, removing all anxieties, and brings immense peace of mind.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for her worship?
faq.a2: Tuesday and Saturday are considered highly auspicious for worshipping Maa Chintpurni. Additionally, she is specially worshipped during Navratri.
faq.q3: What offering (Prasad) is preferred for Mother Chintpurni during Aarti?
faq.a3: She is very fond of offerings like Halwa, Poori, black chickpeas (Chane), and seasonal fruits.
faq.q4: Can her Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it can be performed with full purity and devotion in the home temple while meditating on Maa Chintpurni.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti?
faq.a5: Chanting 'Om Aim Hreem Kleem Chamundayai Vichche' or 'Om Chintpurnyai Namah' after the Aarti is very effective.
